prompt: A candid 1990s beach scene in Spain, photographed like a real family snapshot on color film, vertical composition. A crowded urban beach under bright midday summer sun, with warm beige sand in the foreground, calm blue sea to the right, and a long curve of densely packed apartment buildings and low hills across the bay in the background. In the center foreground, a shirtless middle-aged man with dark hair sits on a towel with his back partly toward the camera, wearing bright blue swim trunks, relaxed and slightly slouched. Around him are 3 small children playing in the sand, one standing in red swim briefs and two seated nearby in light-colored swimsuits. Scatter beach towels, coolers, bags, sandals, and personal belongings across the sand. Include exactly 3 prominent beach umbrellas: 1 multicolored floral umbrella on the left, 1 red-and-white striped umbrella near the center-left, and 1 solid pink umbrella on the right. Fill the midground with many sunbathers and swimmers in natural, unstaged poses, evoking everyday summer life rather than tourism advertising. The mood is nostalgic, ordinary, and authentic, with slight film grain, soft faded colors, mild haze, and the imperfect realism of a 1990s consumer camera. Documentary photography, zero stock-photo polish, believable skin tones, ambient beach clutter, spontaneous composition, subtle vintage print texture. Add a small modern app watermark in the top-right corner reading Pollo AI.
